title: Headache follow-up in GP
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

source.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged 12 years and over with headache disorders, including migraine.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for headache and migraine assessment in people aged 12 years and over; partial for adult-only DHA comparison and not directly validated for UAE pathways outside the DHA source.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

assessment.text: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.
assessment.rationale: The exact headache-feature section supports interval location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medicine-overuse context without assigning headache type.

source.title: Headaches in over 12s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged 12 years and over with headache disorders, including migraine.
source.setting: Primary and specialist assessment and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for headache and migraine assessment in people aged 12 years and over; partial for adult-only DHA comparison and not directly validated for UAE pathways outside the DHA source.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

assessment.text: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA adult red-flag section supports clinician-assessed systemic, neurological, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change concern plus available examination without asserting absence.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.

assessment.text: Supports recording headache frequency, duration, severity, intervention effectiveness, impact, and clinician-led further investigation or referral when red flags develop.
assessment.rationale: The exact diary and reassessment section supports recording existing diary, frequency, duration, severity, intervention effectiveness, impact, results, clinician discussion, referral status, and follow-up without generating an investigation.
